title: rubus scaberrimus
intro: Rubus scaberrimus, also known as the thistle-bracted dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. It is native to North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus scaberrimus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots can be used to make herbal preparations, such as infusions and salves.
